_comment: Copy this file to pricing.json and fill in your own numbers. Pass prospect_inputs programmatically via aggregate_shadow_report() or the saski-shadow aggregate CLI --config flag. pricing.json is gitignored so your figures never get committed. All values are token counts you supply; this package computes no dollar figure.
_optional_advanced_overrides: The two keys below are optional. If omitted, documented defaults are used (regulated_mode_floor_tokens=85, warning_append_tokens=50).
